read_position: post-instruction token (-1), agentic context (AgentHarm tools in prompt)
layer_index: 0-based over transformer blocks; embedding layer skipped (hidden_states[l+1])
trained_on: AgentHarm val test split: 32 harmful (1) / 32 benign (0)
svm: LinearSVC C=0.1, StandardScaler folded into raw-space (w,b): score = x@w + b
